zh.La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平
zh.La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Fran: 法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de la Tour-du-Pin於1227年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平時，她的父親Albert de la Tour du Pin III37歲，母親Beatrice De Coligny27歲。她於1241年6月8日與Rodolphe de Genève結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de la Tour-du-Pin于1227年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾拉 圖-度-平时，她的父亲Albert de la Tour du Pin III37岁，母亲Beatrice De Coligny27岁。她于1241年6月8日与Rodolphe de Genève结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de la Tour-du-Pin was born in 1227, in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Albert de la Tour du Pin III, was 37 and her mother, Beatrice De Coligny, was 27. She married Rodolphe de Genève on 8 June 1241. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1285, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de la Tour-du-Pin est née en 1227, à La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Albert de la Tour du Pin III, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Beatrice De Coligny, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Rodolphe de Genève le 8 juin 1241. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1285, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de la Tour-du-Pin 1227 in La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albert de la Tour du Pin III 37 und ihre Mutter Beatrice De Coligny 27. Sie hat am 8. Juni 1241 Rodolphe de Genève geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1285 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de la Tour-du-Pin è nata il nel 1227 nel La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Albert de la Tour du Pin III, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Beatrice De Coligny, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Rodolphe de Genève il 8 giugno 1241. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1285, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Al: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアラ トウル-ドウ-パン

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de la Tour-du-Pinが1227年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアラ トウル-ドウ-パンで生まれた時，父Albert de la Tour du Pin IIIは37歳，母Beatrice De Colignyは27歳であった。1241年6月8日にRodolphe de Genèveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de la Tour-du-Pin(이)가 1227년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 라 토우-드-핀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert de la Tour du Pin III(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice De Coligny(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1241년 6월 8일 Rodolphe de Genève(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de la Tour-du-Pin nasceu em 1227, em La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Albert de la Tour du Pin III, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice De Coligny, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Rodolphe de Genève em 8 de junho de 1241. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1285, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de la Tour-du-Pin родилась в 1227 г. в местности ла тоур-ду-пин, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Albert de la Tour du Pin III было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice De Coligny, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rodolphe de Genève 8 июня 1241 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1285 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de la Tour-du-Pin nació en 1227, en La Tour-du-Pin, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Albert de la Tour du Pin III, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Beatrice De Coligny, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Rodolphe de Genève el 8 de junio de 1241. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1285, a la edad de 58 años.
